title: dahlia variabilis
intro: Dahlia variabilis, also known as Dahlia pinnata, is a plant species from the dahlia genus, native to Mexico and Central America, characterized by its showy, pom-pom-like flowers and edible parts. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dahlia variabilis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its roots and tubers are edible and can be used in cooking, although caution is advised due to potential toxicity.
